typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varCurFile as string (),
	varDestination as string (),
	varFile as string (),
	varFileExists as boolean (),
	varFileToProcess as string (),
	varFolder as string (),
	varListFiles as string (),
	varSource as string (),
	varSSISOps_41810BC2F6BB4812A8B996347D2389EF_RowCount_1 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_41810BC2F6BB4812A8B996347D2389EF_RowCount_2 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_DisableBIxAuditing as boolean (),
	varSSISOps_GroupNames as string (),
	pkgParamBatchID as integer (),
	pkgParamDestinationConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamInterfaceID as integer (),
	pkgParamPackageID as integer (),
	pkgParamSourceConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamSourceStoredProcedure as string ()
}

source(output(
		{Site Key} as string,
		{Product key} as string,
		Quantity as string,
		{Current date year} as string,
		{Current date month} as string,
		{Current date day} as string,
		{Expiry date year} as string,
		{Expiry date month} as string,
		{Expiry date day} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FlatFileSource
FlatFileSource derive({Site Key} = {Site Key}) ~> PlaceHolderSRCFlatFileSource
PlaceHolderSRCFlatFileSource derive(InterfaceID = $Package__pkgParamInterfaceID,
		SiteKeyReplaced = toString(substring(toString(replace(Site_Key, toString('\"'), toString(''))), toInteger(1), toInteger(30))),
		ProductKeyReplaced = toString(substring(toString(replace(Product_key, toString('\"'), toString(''))), toInteger(1), toInteger(30))),
		CurrentDateYearReplaced = toString(substring(toString(replace(Current_date_year, toString('\"'), toString(''))), toInteger(1), toInteger(4))),
		CurrentDateMonthReplaced = toString(substring(toString(replace(Current_date_month, toString('\"'), toString(''))), toInteger(1), toInteger(2))),
		CurrentDateDayReplaced = toString(substring(toString(replace(Current_date_day, toString('\"'), toString(''))), toInteger(1), toInteger(2))),
		ExpiryDateYearReplaced = toString(substring(toString(replace(Expiry_date_year, toString('\"'), toString(''))), toInteger(1), toInteger(4))),
		ExpiryDateMonthReplaced = toString(substring(toString(replace(Expiry_date_month, toString('\"'), toString(''))), toInteger(1), toInteger(2))),
		ExpiryDateDayReplaced = toString(substring(toString(replace(Expiry_date_day, toString('\"'), toString(''))), toInteger(1), toInteger(2))),
		QuantityReplaced = toInteger(toString(substring(toString(replace(replace(Quantity, toString('\"'), toString('')), toString('\r'), toString(''))), toInteger(1), toInteger(100))))) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn derive(InterfaceID = InterfaceID) ~> PlaceHolderDESTOLEDBDestination
PlaceHolderDESTOLEDBDestination sink(input(
		Expiry_date_year as string,
		Expiry_date_month as string,
		Current_date_month as string,
		Current_date_year as string,
		Product_key as string,
		Site_key as string,
		Current_date_day as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		Expiry_date_day as string,
		InterfaceID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Expiry_date_year = ExpiryDateYearReplaced,
		Expiry_date_month = ExpiryDateMonthReplaced,
		Current_date_month = CurrentDateMonthReplaced,
		Current_date_year = CurrentDateYearReplaced,
		Product_key = ProductKeyReplaced,
		Site_key = SiteKeyReplaced,
		Current_date_day = CurrentDateDayReplaced,
		Quantity = QuantityReplaced,
		Expiry_date_day = ExpiryDateDayReplaced,
		InterfaceID)) ~> OLEDBDestination
